deploy.startCommand:
bash -c 'set -o pipefail; exec 2>&1; printf "[start %s] stage=container-up port=%s
" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "${PORT:-3000}"; printf "[start %s] stage=migrate-begin
" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; timeout 45 npx prisma migrate deploy; mig=$?; printf "[start %s] stage=migrate-end exit=%s
" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$mig"; export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-http-header-size=65536"; printf "[start %s] stage=next-start port=%s node_options=%s
" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "${PORT:-3000}" "$NODE_OPTIONS"; exec npx next start -H 0.0.0.0 -p "${PORT:-3000}"'
